meta.game: Denver Nuggets at San Antonio Spurs

DEN.headline: Nuggets sit several players vs. Spurs; Jokic questionable
DEN.description: The Nuggets are resting the majority of their rotation vs. the Spurs on Sunday, and three-time MVP Nikola Jokic is listed as questionable.

DEN.headline: Nuggets win 11th straight, beating Thunder 127-107 in battle of reserves as playoffs approach
DEN.description: — Jonas Valanciunas had season highs of 23 points and 17 rebounds, and the Denver Nuggets beat the Oklahoma City Thunder 127-107 in a battle of reserves Friday night.

DEN.headline: Oklahoma City Thunder vs. Denver Nuggets: Game Highlights
DEN.description: Oklahoma City Thunder vs. Denver Nuggets: Game Highlights

DEN.headline: NBA's Friday slate sees at least 168 out with injury or illness
DEN.description: Around the NBA, no fewer than 168 players were held out of Friday's games, including reigning MVP Shai Gilgeous-Alexander, three-time MVP Nikola Jokic and 14 members of the Grizzlies.

DEN.headline: NBA's most valuable players in 15 categories: Scoring, shooting, more
DEN.description: From best fadeaway to the MVP, Dean Oliver uses ESPN Analytics' Net Points metric to wrap up the season by handing out awards.

SA.headline: Nuggets sit several players vs. Spurs; Jokic questionable
SA.description: The Nuggets are resting the majority of their rotation vs. the Spurs on Sunday, and three-time MVP Nikola Jokic is listed as questionable.

SA.headline: Checkmates and closeouts: Inside the NBA's quiet chess boom
SA.description: NBA players are spending more time than ever working on the boards -- but we're not talking rebounds.

SA.headline: Victor Wembanyama hits 65 games as he checks another 'box'
SA.description: Victor Wembanyama reached the 65-game threshold for awards eligibility with a 40-point outing that included 13 rebounds in a 139-120 win over the Mavericks.

SA.headline: NBA's Friday slate sees at least 168 out with injury or illness
SA.description: Around the NBA, no fewer than 168 players were held out of Friday's games, including reigning MVP Shai Gilgeous-Alexander, three-time MVP Nikola Jokic and 14 members of the Grizzlies.

SA.headline: Victor Wembanyama has 40 points, 13 rebounds in 65th game to lead Spurs past Mavericks 139-120
SA.description: — Victor Wembanyama had 40 points and 13 rebounds in his 65th game to become eligible for NBA awards, and the San Antonio Spurs beat the Dallas Mavericks 139-120 on Friday night.
